Q22.2: My first guess was based simply on the proportion of red urns I knew there were. When I got the information about the ball color, I weighed how likely it was that I'd get that color ball if the urn was in fact red. Then I adjusted my percentage accordingly. In some cases when the chance of a red urn was low to begin with and there were a high percentage of blue balls in blue urns, if the ball was blue, I stayed with my guess for the red urn since that's what I would expect to see if the urns were mostly blue.
